title: Engineering Hub
description: Represents one of Walmart's 10 global engineering hubs. The top-level organisational anchor for all services, teams, and infrastructure within that geography.

location.title: City / Location
location.description: Physical city and country of the hub (e.g. Bentonville AR, USA)

region.title: Region
region.description: Broad geographic region for grouping and dashboarding

hub_lead.title: Engineering Hub Lead
hub_lead.description: The VP / Director of Engineering accountable for this hub

hub_lead_email.title: Hub Lead Email
hub_lead_email.description: Direct contact for escalations and ownership queries

slack_channel.title: Slack Channel URL
slack_channel.description: Primary Slack channel for hub-wide communications

developer_count.title: Developer Headcount
developer_count.description: Approximate number of software engineers currently active in this hub

primary_cloud_provider.title: Primary Cloud Provider
primary_cloud_provider.description: The dominant cloud platform used by this hub

established_date.title: Established Date
established_date.description: When this engineering hub was formally established

on_call_rotation_url.title: On-Call Rotation URL
on_call_rotation_url.description: Link to PagerDuty / OpsGenie schedule for hub-level on-call

production_readiness_target.title: Production Readiness Target (%)
production_readiness_target.description: The hub's internal target score for production readiness scorecards (0-100)

hub_wiki_badge.title: Wiki & Comms
hub_wiki_badge.description: Quick-access badge combining Slack and Confluence links
